inputs.resume_text:
Aryan Sharma
aryan.sharma@email.com | +91-9876543210 | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/aryan-sharma | GitHub: github.com/aryan-ds
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Results-driven Data Scientist with 4+ years of experience designing and deploying ML/NLP pipelines at scale. Proficient
in Python, LangChain, and cloud platforms. Proven track record of delivering end-to-end AI solutions that reduce
operational costs and improve business outcomes. Strong communicator with experience collaborating across
cross-functional teams.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming: Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow), SQL, R
ML / AI: Supervised & Unsupervised Learning, NLP, LLMs, RAG, Fine-tuning, LangChain, LangSmith
Data Engineering: Apache Spark, Airflow, dbt, ETL pipeline design
Visualization: Power BI, Tableau, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly
Cloud: AWS (SageMaker, S3, Lambda), GCP (BigQuery, Vertex AI), Azure ML
WORK EXPERIENCE
Senior Data Scientist | Infosys AI Labs, Pune | Jun 2022 – Present
 Built an LLM-based document intelligence platform using LangChain + OpenAI GPT-4, reducing manual review time by 65%.
 Designed modular RAG pipelines with LangSmith tracing for production monitoring and debugging.
 Trained a custom NER model on 200K+ resumes achieving 91% F1-score for skill extraction.
 Led a team of 4 data scientists; mentored juniors on MLOps best practices and CI/CD workflows.
 Deployed Airflow-orchestrated ML pipelines on AWS SageMaker serving 2M+ predictions/month.
Data Scientist | Wipro Analytics, Bangalore | Aug 2020 – May 2022
 Developed churn prediction model (XGBoost) achieving AUC-ROC of 0.93 for a telecom client.
 Built real-time sentiment analysis system using BERT, deployed via FastAPI + Docker on GCP.
 Automated EDA and reporting pipelines saving ~12 hrs/week for business stakeholders.
EDUCATION
M.Tech in Data Science & AI – IIT Bombay (2020)
B.E. in Computer Engineering – Pune University (2018)
TOOLS & TECHNOLOGIES
LangChain, LangSmith, OpenAI API, HuggingFace, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, FastAPI, Git, Jupyter, VS Code,
Postman
CERTIFICATIONS
 AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty (2023)
 Google Professional Data Engineer (2022)
 Deep Learning Specialization – Coursera / DeepLearning.AI (2021)

outputs.output:
## Candidate Snapshot

- Total Experience (if explicitly stated): 4+ years

## Skills
- Technical Skills: Python, SQL, R, ML/AI, Data Engineering, Visualization
- Tools/Platforms: LangChain, LangSmith, OpenAI API, HuggingFace, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, FastAPI, Git, Jupyter, VS Code, Postman, AWS, GCP, Azure ML
- Domains: Not mentioned

## Education & Certifications
- Education: M.Tech in Data Science & AI – IIT Bombay (2020), B.E. in Computer Engineering – Pune University (2018)
- Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty (2023), Google Professional Data Engineer (2022), Deep Learning Specialization – Coursera / DeepLearning.AI (2021)

## Key Evidence
- Built an LLM-based document intelligence platform using LangChain + OpenAI GPT-4, reducing manual review time by 65%.
- Designed modular RAG pipelines with LangSmith tracing for production monitoring and debugging.
- Trained a custom NER model on 200K+ resumes achieving 91% F1-score for skill extraction.
- Deployed Airflow-orchestrated ML pipelines on AWS SageMaker serving 2M+ predictions/month.
- Developed churn prediction model (XGBoost) achieving AUC-ROC of 0.93 for a telecom client.
